harness.js:3:2-18:4
> exec(("heroku config --app " + app), function(err, stdout) {
  if (err)   return cb(err);
  var config = {};
  var lines = stdout["split"]("
");
  lines["shift"]();
  lines["forEach"](function(line) {
  if (! line["trim"]())   return ;
  var parts = line["split"](": ");
  if (! parts[1]) { console["log"]("could not parse", line); } else { config[parts[0]["trim"]()] = parts[1]["trim"](); }
});
  cb(null, config);
});

Reached sensitive command-injection sink 'child_process.exec' with symbolic expr:
(str.++ "heroku config --app " payload)
